name: Beer Bread 3
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, parmesan cheese, and dried herbs.
2. Mix well.
3. Stir in the room temperature beer until a stiff batter forms.
4. Preheat the oven to 325°F (160°C).
5. Grease a large loaf pan with shortening and sprinkle the bottom and sides with cornmeal.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 325°F (160°C) for about one hour.
8. Brush the baked loaf with softened butter and sprinkle additional cornmeal on top if desired.
9. Turn out the bread onto a wire rack and allow to cool before serving.
